title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd!
